summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KETE Kohvik café website. All 14 required features tested successfully including hero section, navigation, content accuracy, forms, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section displays KETE Kohvik name with 4.6 star rating (270 reviews)
Navigation menu works - all 5 section links scroll correctly to target sections
About section displays correct nostalgic café info in old village shop
Services section shows 3 cards: Hubane Kohvik, Peosaal, Kodused Road
Menu section displays budget-friendly prices (€2-€9) with Supid, Pearoad, Joogid categories
Gallery section displays 4 images from visitestonia.com/puhkaeestis.ee
Contact section shows correct address: Maarjamõisa tee 11, Aravete, 73501 Järva maakond
Contact section shows correct phone: +372 5804 1520 (5 clickable phone links found)
Contact section shows correct opening hours: E-N 11-15, R 10-15, L-P Suletud
Facebook link works and points to correct profile (3 Facebook links found)
Google Maps iframe loads and shows Aravete location correctly
Contact form works with toast notification and form validation
Phone call buttons work (tel: links) - all 5 phone links functional
Mobile responsive navigation works with hamburger menu and mobile links
All images load correctly from visitestonia.com
